ui_label: Horizontal grid cell with a hierarchical discrete global grid grid type and 1.40625 x 1.417 degree resolution.
description: A regular latitude-longitude grid for land surface modeling in CoLM (CAS-ESM). The grid has dimensions 256 (longitude) × 128 (latitude), including grid points at both the North and South Poles. The nominal horizontal resolution is approximately 1.4° × 1.4°, corresponding to a longitudinal spacing of 360°/256 = 1.40625° and a latitudinal spacing of approximately 1.417° (180° divided by 127 intervals between the two poles) between adjacent grid points. This is the same grid as g134-mass used in IAP-AGCM.
